temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A close-up shot reveals a silver flip phone with a cracked screen, lying inside a clear plastic evidence bag. A hand reaches in and picks up the phone. Next to it is a small, black tin box with a red and white picture of a woman on the front. The scene is set on a table covered with a plastic sheet. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes that a crime has occurred, and the phone is a key piece of evidence being examined.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play, building tension.)
(00:04-00:07) A man in a light blue shirt and tie sits in an office chair, his face partially obscured by shadows. He holds the plastic evidence bag containing the phone and tin box, examining them with a serious and intense expression as he looks off-screen. (Storyline: This introduces a character, likely a detective or investigator, who is deeply involved in the case. His intense expression suggests he is processing the gravity of the evidence.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful, dramatic music continues, heightening the sense of mystery.)
